headline: Norfolk Southern to upgrade dozens of locomotives
summary: Norfolk Southern and Progress Rail to upgrade 96 DC-traction locomotives to AC, part of a fleet transformation strengthening operations and supporting sustainable shipping. The post Norfolk Southern to upgrade dozens of locomotives appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: The Price When Norfolk Southern Becomes Attractive
summary: Norfolk Southern (NSC) is a core U.S. rail operator with a strong intermodal network focused on the Eastern U.S. Read the latest analysis on the stock and its merger with Union Pacific here.

headline: Union Pacific Corporation CEO Jim Vena and CFO Jennifer Hamann to Address the J.P. Morgan 2026 Industrials Conference
summary: OMAHA, Neb., March 11, 2026--Jim Vena, chief executive officer and Jennifer Hamann, executive vice president and chief financial officer, of Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP) will address the J.P. Morgan 2026 Industrials Conference on Wednesday, March 18, 2026, at 8:45 a.m. ET.

headline: Why The Union Pacific (UNP) Story Is Shifting With Merger Debate And Infrastructure Moves
summary: Union Pacific’s fair value estimate has shifted from US$266.08 to US$272.21 per share, a modest reset that puts fresh numbers behind the current analyst debate. That move sits against a backdrop of Street research split between optimism on potential Norfolk Southern merger synergies, as well as caution around regulatory scrutiny and a freight cycle that some see as already well reflected in rail valuations. As you read on, you will see how these moving parts shape the evolving narrative and...
